sentence: וְלִמְשֹׁל בַּיּוֹם וּבַלַּיְלָה וּלְהַבְדִּיל בֵּין הָאוֹר וּבֵין הַחֹשֶׁךְ וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים כִּי־טוֹב

grammatical-notes.וְלִמְשֹׁל: Conjunction + Preposition + Infinitive 'mashal'. 'And to rule/exercise dominion'.

dictionary-meaning.וְלִמְשֹׁל: And to exercise functional dominion — maintaining consistency with the 'memshelet' noun (Rule 21).

main-translation: ***'And to exercise functional dominion during the day and during the night, and to maintain the sovereign and fixed boundary between the light and the darkness'; and Elohim personally inspected and appraised the result, witnessing that it was excellent in both function and nature.***

main-translation-explanation.exercise functional dominion: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the purpose of the regulators as active rule (Rule 21).

rejected-translations.reason: Thin; fails to disclose the specific 'dominion' intent.
